title: Tillandsia beutelspacheri
taxonomy: Tillandsia beutelspacheri is a species of epiphytic plant within the family Bromeliaceae. It is native to Mexico and is classified as a Tillandsia species due to its air plant characteristics. Tillandsia beutelspacheri is a type of bromeliad, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The plant is further classified within the subfamily Tillandsioideae, and is closely related to other Tillandsia species. Tillandsia beutelspacheri is also sometimes referred to as a Tillandsia species within the broader context of the Bromelioideae clade.
